summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Addrika registration flow, zone-based shipping thresholds, and dark mode features. 14/14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified gender field auto-title mapping, mandatory address fields, and dark mode on Find Retailers and Checkout pages.

2_zone_based_shipping_delhi_ncr.details: Delhi NCR zone (pincode 110*, 201*, 122*) correctly returns threshold ₹499

3_zone_based_shipping_rest_of_india.details: Rest of India zone correctly returns threshold ₹2999 (NOTE: This is ₹2999 not ₹999 as mentioned in previous iteration)

4_free_shipping_eligibility.details: Free shipping correctly applied when subtotal exceeds zone threshold

5_registration_gender_field.details: Gender field present with data-testid='register-gender-select', options: Male, Female, Other

6_registration_title_auto_update.details: Selecting Male auto-sets title to 'Mr.', selecting Female auto-sets to 'Ms.'

7_registration_mandatory_address.details: Address fields (PIN Code, Street Address, City, State) are mandatory. Validation errors shown when missing.

8_duplicate_email_prevention.details: OTP send correctly rejects already registered emails with 'Email already registered' error

9_duplicate_phone_prevention.details: Registration with duplicate phone number rejected with 'phone number is already registered' error

10_dark_mode_find_retailers.details: Find Retailers page has dark mode toggle and renders correctly in dark mode. 14 elements with dark: classes found.

11_dark_mode_checkout.details: Checkout page has dark mode classes (dark:bg-slate-900, dark:bg-slate-800, dark:text-gray-300). Login Required page renders correctly in dark mode.

critical_code_review_comments: shipping_config.py: Rest of India free shipping threshold is ₹2999, not ₹999 as mentioned in iteration_13 report. The actual code shows threshold: 2999.
Checkout.jsx: Dark mode properly implemented with dark:bg-slate-900, dark:bg-slate-800, dark:text-gray-300 classes
FindRetailers.jsx: Dark mode classes applied to main container, retailer cards, and form elements
auth.py: Duplicate phone check uses regex pattern to match regardless of country code prefix
AuthPage.jsx: Gender-to-title mapping implemented in frontend (Male→Mr., Female→Ms.)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during duplicate prevention tests with TEST_ prefix pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Zone-based free shipping: Bhagalpur ₹249, Delhi NCR ₹499, Rest of India ₹2999 (corrected from previous iteration). 2) Registration has gender field with auto-title mapping. 3) Address fields mandatory. 4) Duplicate email/phone prevention working. 5) Dark mode working on Find Retailers and Checkout pages.

important_threshold_correction.issue: Previous iteration_13 report incorrectly stated Rest of India threshold as ₹999
important_threshold_correction.actual: Rest of India threshold is ₹2999 as per shipping_config.py line 37
important_threshold_correction.verified: Backend API test confirmed threshold is 2999

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
